hero.title: Smart Automated Communication
hero.subtitle: Virtual voice and text service up to 8× cheaper than humans. +15 years reshaping CX.

about.title: 15+ years automating customer conversations
about.body_1: BRBots are virtual service systems designed to interact with end consumers, delivering a unique fast and efficient communication experience at up to eight times lower cost than traditional human agents.
about.body_2: We are a leading provider of computerized telephony technology, known for flexibility in tailoring products for marketing, collections, call centers, card issuers, customer service, and more.

cost.desc: Up to 8× cheaper than traditional human service.
